workstreams.scope: Repository-only reconciliation of .project/active-work.json and .project/handoffs/current-state.md after PR #34 merged and PR #33 was closed unmerged as superseded. No infrastructure, workflow, application, credential, live evidence, budget, alert, or Azure resource change is permitted.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This remains the latest promoted Azure control-plane evidence. The post-merge reconciliation does not refresh tenant or subscription context, resource state, effective RBAC, guest health, pricing, quota, actual cost, snapshot recoverability, Trusted Launch bootability, rollback, or recovery.

pr34_exact_head.claim_boundary: CI and owner-account review establish repository design consistency only; they do not prove Azure state or operational recovery.

current_workstream.repository_commit: resolve live reconciliation branch head after the pull request is opened
current_workstream.authority: Live GitHub checks are authoritative. This state-only change must pass fresh exact-head CI before merge.

ci_verification.claim_boundary: CI does not refresh or validate Azure runtime reality and grants no authentication, dispatch, mutation, cost, rollback, recovery, or deployment authority.

pr34_evidence_quality.claim_boundary: The six PR #32 findings were accepted as resolved at the repository-contract level. This is not independent organizational approval and does not prove operational recovery.

conditions: fresh authenticated subscription-specific meter, SKU availability, and quota preflight before any execution
stop and obtain renewed cost approval if projected temporary cost exceeds CAD 4
unconditional stop if projected temporary cost exceeds CAD 10
cleanup owner and deadline must be approved before any temporary resource is created
azure_cost.claim_boundary: Planning feasibility only; this is not actual-cost evidence, a subscription-specific quotation, budget approval, or Azure execution authorization.

verification_criteria: trusted baseline equals live main merge commit 36010582460b393c0667e274144d9700e78721bf

PR #33 is recorded as closed unmerged and superseded
known open pull requests match live GitHub reality

exact-head CI passes for the reconciliation pull request
final diff remains limited to the two .project files
next_bounded_operation.failure_behavior: Keep the reconciliation pull request draft, inspect the exact failing job, patch only the two permitted .project files, and obtain fresh exact-head CI. Do not alter infrastructure or weaken workflow-observability validation.
next_bounded_operation.rollback: Close the reconciliation pull request without merge or revert its repository-only commits. No Azure rollback applies because this operation performs no Azure mutation.
next_bounded_operation.next_gate: Open the draft reconciliation pull request, record its number, obtain fresh exact-head CI, inspect every job, and request explicit merge authorization.
